name: Trehalose T2D microvascular autophagy registry
summary: Recruiting early phase 1 randomized double-masked trial testing 10 g/day trehalose versus placebo for 14 days in type 2 diabetes and healthy-aging context, with nitric-oxide-mediated vasodilation and autophagic-flux protein expression as primary endpoints.
population: Estimated 60 participants in type 2 diabetes and healthy-aging context

trial_details.expected_results_window: The registry estimates primary completion on December 31, 2028 and study completion on December 31, 2029, with no posted results in the June 11, 2026 API view.
trial_details.horizon_note: Recruiting mechanistic trial-watch context, not evidence of benefit.
trial_details.why_it_matters: The study directly measures autophagic-flux protein expression after trehalose, but the short duration and diabetes vascular context make it mechanistic boundary evidence.
